description:
Create a stepped steel shaft for a gearbox. The overall length is 250 mm. The shaft has three sections:

Section 1: Diameter 25 mm, Length 80 mm
Section 2: Diameter 35 mm, Length 100 mm
Section 3: Diameter 20 mm, Length 70 mm

Add a keyway on the middle section:

Width: 10 mm
Depth: 3 mm
Length: 60 mm

Add fillets of 2 mm at all diameter transitions.

Material: Mild Steel.
modelingPlan:
1. Create new part document with Mild Steel material.
2. Sketch three concentric circles for shaft sections (Ø25, Ø35, Ø20).
3. Extrude sections to specified lengths (80mm, 100mm, 70mm).
4. Apply 2mm fillets at diameter transitions.
5. Sketch keyway profile on middle section.
6. Extrude cut keyway (10mm wide, 3mm deep, 60mm long).
